title: Add error on function calling task

features.name: function calling task with timing control
features.description: Code should include a function that calls a task containing @(posedge) timing control, where the task is overridden from a virtual function in a parent class

features.name: virtual function overridden as task
features.description: Code should include a virtual function in a parent class that is overridden as a task with timing control in a child class
